title: ‘All bets are off’: European borrowing costs hit 15-year highs as investors brace for rate hikes
summary_full: Bonds issued by various European countries continued to sell off on Friday, deepening a rout that has been mostly continuous since the U.S.-Iran war began.
summary_public: Bonds issued by various European countries continued to sell off on Friday, deepening a rout that has been mostly continuous since the U.S.-Iran war began.
